tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Soft rain on the window pane
Your sweater and a Sunday stain
Coffee rings on open books
Your sleepy face, your sleepy looks

[Chorus]
These bedroom hours
Just me and you
These bedroom hours
The whole world moves but we stay true
These bedroom hours
Are all I need
These bedroom hours
Are poetry

[Verse 2]
The record player spinning slow
Afternoon light its amber glow
Half awake and half a dream
Everything is what it seems

[Chorus]
These bedroom hours
Just me and you
These bedroom hours
The whole world moves but we stay true
These bedroom hours
Are all I need
These bedroom hours
Are poetry

[Bridge]
Don't need anywhere to go
Just this moment, just this glow
Let the afternoon run slow
Let it go, let it go

[Outro]
Bedroom hours, bedroom hours
Just like this, just like this

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Les lumières de Paris brillent sous la pluie
Je marche seule ce soir sans toi dans ma vie
Ton parfum sur ma peau reste encore ce matin
Paris minuit, Paris minuit

[Pre-Chorus]
Je voulais qu'on reste
Mais tu es parti sans un mot
Laisse-moi ma tristesse
Et le souvenir de toi

[Chorus]
Paris minuit, je danse sous les étoiles
Tu es loin mais ton amour est ma boussole
Paris minuit, je chante pour toi
Le ciel de Paris garde tous nos émois
Paris minuit

[Verse 2]
Le Marais endormi, les cafés fermés
Je serre ton manteau que tu as oublié
La Seine reflète nos nuits d'été
Paris minuit, Paris minuit

[Chorus]
Paris minuit, je danse sous les étoiles
Tu es loin mais ton amour est ma boussole
Paris minuit, je chante pour toi
Le ciel de Paris garde tous nos émois
Paris minuit

[Bridge]
Reviens, reviens
Je t'attends au pont des arts
Reviens, reviens
Paris s'endort sans toi ce soir

[Outro]
Paris minuit, Paris minuit
Je t'aime encore, je t'aime encore

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Neon lights bleeding through the blinds
3AM and you're still on my mind
Dripping in your silence, I'm undone
Baby tell me why you always run

[Pre-Chorus]
I keep all your secrets close
The ones you never said out loud
Dancing on the edge of us
Lost inside this midnight cloud

[Chorus]
These midnight confessions
Won't leave my lips tonight
I'm drowning in your memory
Baby hold me tight
Midnight confessions
What we had was real
Writing love and dark romance
In every beat I feel

[Verse 2]
Your cologne still on my pillowcase
Photographs I never could erase
Plugg vibes and your diamond eyes
Baby don't you know I don't tell lies

[Pre-Chorus]
I keep all your secrets close
The ones you never said out loud
Dancing on the edge of us
Lost inside this midnight cloud

[Chorus]
These midnight confessions
Won't leave my lips tonight
I'm drowning in your memory
Baby hold me tight
Midnight confessions
What we had was real
Writing love and dark romance
In every beat I feel

[Bridge]
You said forever in the dark
Now silence echoes in my heart
But every night I light the spark
You left your mark

[Outro]
Midnight confessions, midnight confessions
Still yours, still yours

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Intro]
Yeah, no cap zone
Assirem Music, let's go

[Verse 1]
They said I wouldn't make it, now I'm on the rise
Drip heavy on the stage, got the fire in my eyes
No handouts, no shortcuts, built this from the ground
Put the city on my back now they all know my sound
Midnight moves, silent grind, never sleep for free
Every sacrifice I made is what you now see

[Pre-Chorus]
They doubted every move I made
But pressure made me diamonds babe
No cap, no cap

[Chorus]
No cap zone, this is real life
Everything I got I earned through the night
No cap zone, hear the crowd scream
Nothing gonna stop me from chasing my dream
No cap zone, no cap zone
Built this from the basement, not a stepping stone

[Verse 2]
Studio sessions 'til the sunrise breaks
Counting every lesson that a failure makes
Real ones know the struggle, fake ones fade away
Put the work in every night to get my flowers one day
Heavy on the vision, light upon the doubt
Everything they said I couldn't is exactly what I'm about

[Chorus]
No cap zone, this is real life
Everything I got I earned through the night
No cap zone, hear the crowd scream
Nothing gonna stop me from chasing my dream
No cap zone, no cap zone
Built this from the basement, not a stepping stone

[Bridge]
I remember sleeping on the floor
Told myself I wanted more
Now the world is knocking at my door
No cap, that's for sure

[Outro]
No cap zone, no cap zone
Assirem, we keep going

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Sunlight slipping through the curtain crack
Coffee steam, my old guitar in back
Phone is silent, world can wait outside
Sunday morning's on my side

[Pre-Chorus]
Take it slow, take it easy
Nothing on this Sunday's leaving

[Chorus]
Sunday morning, soft and slow
Nothing's broken, nothing to know
Just the birds and the radio
Sunday morning, soft and slow

[Verse 2]
Pancakes burning just a little dark
Cat is yawning in a sunlight park
Letters left unread on the table side
Sunday morning's a quiet ride

[Chorus]
Sunday morning, soft and slow
Nothing's broken, nothing to know
Just the birds and the radio
Sunday morning, soft and slow

[Outro]
Let the morning be the morning
